subscribe_info: Subscribe to get the latest news from Hebrante
history_p1: Hebrante, founded in 2016 by Héctor Silva Villamizar in Bogotá, brings together the tradition of knitwear with contemporary design. Its collections are inspired by the diversity of Colombia—its landscapes, flora, and fauna—transforming colors and textures into garments with identity and character.
workshop_p1: The workshop is the heart of Hebrante. There, each garment is crafted with precision and respect for the craft, combining tradition and design. It is a space where knowledge passed down through generations of knitters is kept alive and projected into the future.
privacy_p2: Hebrante manages this store and this website, including the data, content, features, tools, products, and services in order to provide you, the customer, with a curated shopping experience (the “Services”). This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, and disclose your personal information when you visit, use, or make a purchase or any other transaction through the Services, or when you communicate with us by any other means. In the event of any conflict between our Terms of Service and this Privacy Policy, this Privacy Policy shall prevail with respect to the collection, processing, and disclosure of your personal information.
privacy_p3: We kindly ask you to read this Privacy Policy carefully. By using and accessing any of the Services, you acknowledge that you have read this Privacy Policy and understand how your personal information is collected, used, and disclosed, in accordance with the provisions set forth herein.
privacy_h1: Personal Information We Collect or Process
privacy_p4: When we use the term “personal information”, we refer to any data that identifies you or that can reasonably be linked to you or another individual. Personal information does not include data that has been collected anonymously or that has been de-identified, so that it cannot identify you or reasonably be linked to you. We may collect or process the following categories of personal information — including inferences drawn from such information — depending on how you interact with the Services, where you reside, and what is permitted or required by applicable law:
privacy_p5: Contact details, including your name, address, billing address, shipping address, phone number, and email address.
privacy_p6: Financial information, including credit card numbers, debit card numbers, and financial account information, payment card details, financial account data, transaction details, payment method, payment confirmation, and other payment-related information.
privacy_p7: Account information, including your username, password, security questions, preferences, and settings.
privacy_p8: Transaction information, including the items you view, add to your cart, save to your wishlist, or purchase, return, exchange, or cancel, as well as your past transactions.
privacy_p9: Communications with us, including the information you provide in your communications with us, for example when you submit a customer service request.
privacy_p10: Device information, including information about your device, browser, or network connection, your IP address, and other unique identifiers.
privacy_p11: Usage information, including information related to your interaction with the Services, such as how and when you use or browse them.
privacy_p12: We may collect personal information from the following sources:
privacy_p13: Directly from you, including when you create an account, visit or use the Services, communicate with us, or otherwise provide us with your personal information.
privacy_p14: Automatically through the Services, including information from your device when you use our products or services or visit our websites, as well as through the use of cookies and similar technologies.
privacy_p15: From our service providers, including when we engage them to enable certain technology or when they collect or process your personal information on our behalf.
privacy_p16: <span class='bold'>From our partners or other third parties.
privacy_h3: How We Use Your Personal Information
privacy_p17: Depending on how you interact with us or which Services you use, we may use your personal information for the following purposes:
privacy_p18: Providing, personalizing, and improving the Services. We use your personal information to provide you with the Services, including fulfilling the contract entered into with you, processing your payments, managing your orders, remembering your preferences and the items you are interested in, sending you account-related notifications, handling purchases, returns, exchanges, or other transactions, creating, maintaining, and managing your account, arranging shipping, facilitating returns and exchanges, enabling you to post reviews, and providing you with a personalized shopping experience, such as recommending products related to your purchases. This may include using your personal information to personalize and improve the Services.
privacy_p19: Marketing and advertising. We use your personal information for marketing and promotional purposes, such as sending you commercial, advertising, and promotional communications by email, text message, or postal mail, as well as showing you online advertisements for products or services on the Services or on other websites, including based on items you have previously purchased, added to your cart, or other activities on the Services.
privacy_p20: Security and fraud prevention. We use your personal information to authenticate your account, provide a secure shopping and payment experience, detect, investigate, or take action against possible fraudulent, illegal, harmful, or malicious activities, protect public safety, and ensure the security of our Services. If you choose to use the Services and register an account, you are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials. We strongly recommend that you do not share your username, password, or other information with anyone.
privacy_p21: Communicating with you. We use your personal information to provide customer support, respond to your requests, deliver services efficiently, and maintain our business relationship with you.
privacy_p22: Legal reasons. We use your personal information to comply with applicable laws or respond to valid legal processes, including requests from law enforcement or government authorities, as well as to investigate or participate in civil discovery, potential or actual litigation, or other adversarial legal proceedings, and to enforce or investigate potential violations of our terms or policies.
privacy_p23: We may share your personal information with third parties in certain circumstances and for legitimate reasons, in accordance with this Privacy Policy. These circumstances may include:
privacy_p24: Service providers that work on our behalf, such as payment services, web hosting, data analytics, customer support, and order and shipping management.
privacy_p25: Marketing and advertising partners, in order to provide promotional communications or relevant advertising.
privacy_p26: When you request or authorize it, for example when using social media integrations or requesting product delivery.
privacy_p27: Within our corporate group or with affiliates, when necessary to operate our business.
privacy_p28: To comply with legal obligations, respond to requests from competent authorities, or protect our rights, as well as those of our users or third parties.
privacy_p29: The Services may include links to websites or platforms operated by third parties. If you access these links, we recommend that you review their respective privacy policies and terms of use.
privacy_p30: We are not responsible for the privacy practices or the content of such websites. The inclusion of links to third-party platforms does not necessarily imply a recommendation or endorsement of their content.
privacy_p31: The Services are not intended for minors, and we do not knowingly collect personal information from children.
privacy_p32: If you are a parent or legal guardian and believe that a minor has provided us with personal information, you may contact us to request its deletion.
privacy_p33: We take reasonable measures to protect the personal information of our users. However, no security system is completely infallible, and we cannot guarantee absolute security of the information.
privacy_p34: We will retain your personal information for as long as necessary to provide our services, comply with legal obligations, or resolve potential disputes.
privacy_p35: Depending on the applicable laws in your place of residence, you may have certain rights regarding your personal information. These may include:
privacy_p36: Right of access, to request a copy of the personal information we hold about you.
privacy_p37: Right to rectification, to request the correction of inaccurate data.
privacy_p38: Right to erasure, to request the deletion of your personal information.
privacy_p39: Right to data portability, to request a copy of your data in a transferable format under certain circumstances.
privacy_p40: If you wish to exercise any of these rights, you may contact us using the contact details provided below.
privacy_p41: You may also opt out of our promotional communications at any time by using the unsubscribe link included in our emails.
privacy_p42: If you have any complaints about how we process your personal information, we ask that you contact us using the contact details provided below. Depending on where you reside, you may have the right to appeal our decision by contacting us using the contact details provided below, or to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.
privacy_p43: Please note that we may transfer, store, and process your personal information outside the country in which you reside.
privacy_p44: If we transfer your personal information outside the European Economic Area (EEA) or the United Kingdom, we will use recognized transfer mechanisms, such as the European Commission’s Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) or any equivalent contracts issued by the relevant UK authority, as applicable, unless the transfer is made to a country that has been recognized as providing an adequate level of protection.
privacy_p45: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time, including to reflect changes in our practices or for operational, legal, or regulatory reasons. We will post the updated version of this Privacy Policy on this website, update the “Last updated” date, and notify you of changes as required by applicable law.
privacy_p46: If you have any questions about our privacy practices or this Privacy Policy, or if you wish to exercise any of your rights, please email us at hebrantecolombia@gmail.com or contact us at Ak 15 #86a-9, Bogotá, DC, 110221, CO.
refund_p1: We have a 30-day return policy. This means you have 30 calendar days after receiving your order to request a return.
refund_p2: To be eligible for a return, the item must be in the same condition that you received it: unused, with its original tags, and in its original packaging. You will also need to provide proof of purchase.
refund_p3: To initiate a return, you can contact us at: hebrantecolombia@gmail.com.
refund_p4: Returns should be sent to the following address:
refund_p6: Returns will not be accepted without a prior request via email.
refund_p7: Please inspect your order upon receipt. If the item is defective, damaged, or if you received the wrong product, contact us immediately so we can evaluate the issue and provide a solution.
refund_p10: Items on sale or purchased at a discount
refund_p12: If you have any questions about a specific product, you can contact us before making your purchase.
refund_p13: We currently do not offer direct exchanges.
refund_p14: If you would like a different product, you must request a return of the original item (if eligible) and place a new order.
refund_p15: Once we receive and inspect the returned product, we will notify you whether the refund has been approved.
refund_p16: If approved, the refund will be issued using the same payment method used for the purchase, within up to 10 business days.
refund_p17: Please note that your bank or financial institution may take additional time to process and reflect the refund in your account.
refund_p18: If more than 15 business days have passed since the refund was approved and you have not received it, please contact us at hebrantecolombia@gmail.com.
terms_p1: Welcome to Hebrante. The terms “we,” “us,” and “our” refer to Hebrante. Hebrante operates this store and website, including all information, content, features, tools, products, and services to provide you, the customer, with a curated shopping experience (the “Services”).
terms_p2: The following terms and conditions, along with all policies referenced herein (the “Terms of Service” or “Terms”), describe your rights and responsibilities when using the Services.

terms_p5: By agreeing to these Terms of Service, you represent that you are at least the age of majority in your state or province of residence, and that you have given us your consent to allow any minors under your care to use the Services on devices that you own, purchase, or manage.

You represent and warrant that all information you provide is accurate, current, and complete, and that you have all necessary rights to provide such information.

Your order will not be accepted until Hebrante confirms acceptance. We must receive and process your payment before your order is accepted. Please review your order carefully before submitting it, as Hebrante may not be able to accommodate cancellation requests once an order has been accepted. If we do not accept, modify, or cancel an order, we will attempt to notify you using the email address, billing address, or phone number provided at the time the order was placed.
terms_p12: Your purchases are subject to returns or exchanges only in accordance with our Refund Policy.
terms_p13: You represent and warrant that your purchases are for personal or household use only and not for resale or export for commercial purposes.
terms_p14: Prices, discounts, and promotions are subject to change without prior notice. terms_p53: Our contact information is provided below:
shipping_p1: We currently ship within Colombia only.
shipping_p2: We offer free shipping on all orders, with no minimum purchase required.
shipping_p3: Estimated delivery times are between 2 to 5 business days, depending on the destination city. These timeframes may vary during peak seasons, promotions, or due to external circumstances beyond our control.
shipping_p4: Order processing time is 24 to 48 business hours after the purchase has been confirmed.
shipping_p5: Once your order has been shipped, you will receive a tracking number to monitor your delivery.
shipping_p6: If any issues arise with the delivery, we will be available to assist you in resolving them with the shipping carrier.
shipping_p7: It is the customer’s responsibility to provide a complete and accurate shipping address at the time of purchase. In case of incorrect address details or failed delivery attempts, additional costs may apply.
